message:
feat(evidence): implement Confidence Update Algorithm (brenner_bot-njjo.2)

Add Bayesian-inspired confidence update algorithm for hypothesis testing:

- computeConfidenceUpdate(): Core algorithm with discriminative power weighting
- 2x asymmetry: challenging evidence has twice the impact of supporting evidence
- computeBatchConfidenceUpdate(): Apply multiple evidence items sequentially
- analyzeWhatIf(): Explore potential test outcomes before running tests
- Utility functions for assessment labels, formatting, and explanations

The asymmetry reflects Brenner's insight that disproving is more informative
than confirming - many observations can be consistent with a hypothesis,
but strong disconfirming evidence rules out possibilities.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
